name: DataByteSprites Configuration Chart
description: Canonical DataByteSprites configuration registry and first-pass authored matchup model for battle and Download systems. Alignment remains a separate canon system.

model.dualConfigurationRule: A target may expose one or two configurations. The battle engine applies the first matching no-effect, strong, weak, or capture-bonus relationship.
model.neutralRule: Any matchup not explicitly listed resolves to neutral.

alignments.description: Missing, erased, or void-linked sprite alignment.
